Title format: conventional commit (feat:, fix:, chore:, refactor:, docs:, ...).
The PR title becomes the squash-merge commit subject; pr-title-lint enforces this.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One short paragraph: what does this PR do, in plain language? -->

## Context / why

<!-- Why is this change needed? Link any prior discussion. -->

## How to test

<!-- Steps a reviewer can take to verify the change locally. Include screenshots / clips for UI work. -->

## Linked issue
